items.title: Lysosomes and lysosomal dysfunction in ageing biology
items.desc: This Review presents lysosomal dysfunction as a hallmark of ageing that drives age-related pathology, and highlights emerging therapeutic strategies that enhance lysosomal activity to promote healthy ageing or ameliorate ageing-related diseases.
